docs.text: Cartola Project First of all this project is used to improve my skills in Data Engineering and Python. This project try to extract data from API and create Data Lakehouse. In the beginning I will collect information about first division of brazilian national league at the year of 2022. In the future I will expand this lakehouse to other tournament, the first one will Premier League (UK), the second La Liga (Spain) and last one Bundesliga (Germany). After all, I will collect information from previous years.
